Antigravity Core

A reactive neural-mesh background system designed for high-performance decentralized workspaces.

Integration Protocol

  1. Inject antigravity-background.js into your kernel.
  2. Initialize <canvas id="glow-canvas"></canvas>.
  3. Apply hardware-accelerated CSS positioning.
  4. Execute AntigravityBG.start() on DOM ready.
  5. Particles automatically scale complexity based on viewport density.
Return to Command Center
